data.title: Dialpad offers real-time AI capabilities in Japan, free through April 2026. Includes Japanese transcription and AI recaps.
data.description: In San Ramon, California, Dialpad, a prominent AI-powered business communications and agentic platform, unveiled its comprehensive suite of real-time AI functionalities in Japan. From today onwards, Japanese clients can utilize Dialpad's advanced AI features without extra charges until April 2026. The launch encompasses features like real-time Japanese transcription, AI Recaps containing summaries with automated action items, and real-time coaching tools to aid sales.

data.title: ONDA Partners Richard Orsinger and Keith Nelson in Lawdragon Hall of Fame, Scott Downing and Brad LaMorgese in Lawdragon 500.
data.description: In Dallas, the family law firm Orsinger, Nelson, Downing & Anderson, LLP (ONDA) announced that partners Richard Orsinger and Keith Nelson have been inducted into the Lawdragon 2026 Hall of Fame. Additionally, partners Scott Downing and Brad LaMorgese were selected for the prestigious Lawdragon 500 Leading Lawyers in America. The firm's four partners have all received prior recognition from Lawdragon for their exceptional legal work, showcasing leadership in serving clients, communities, and their firm. These accolades solidify their position among the top legal professionals in the country.

data.title: GitLab unveils GitLab Duo Agent Platform. Developers report 10x productivity gains. AI boosts innovation velocity.
data.description: In San Francisco, GitLab Inc. has introduced the GitLab Duo Agent Platform, enhancing the DevSecOps platform. Advanced AI tools have significantly boosted developers' coding efficiency, with reports of up to 10 times productivity increase. Despite this, developers spend only 20% of their time writing code, limiting the overall innovation speed and delivery benefits AI can provide.

data.title: Progresso™ Soup Drops return with new flavors – Chicken Noodle, Tomato Basil, Beef Pot Roast. Free shipping for Walmart+ members or on orders over $35.
data.description: Progresso Soup Drops are making a comeback in new variety cans with flavors like Chicken Noodle, Tomato Basil, and Beef Pot Roast. The fan-favorite Soup Drops provide added warmth, resembling a bowl of Progresso Soup. Walmart+ members can enjoy free shipping, or all orders over $35 on Walmart.com qualify for free shipping.

data.title: LiaFi raises interest rate to 3.10% APY for small business accounts, helping them earn more on idle cash.
data.description: ELIZABETHTOWN, Ky.-- LiaFi, a Fintech platform and app tailored for small businesses, unveiled an increase in the annual percentage yield for its LiaFi Business Account, now offering 3.10% APY* for both new and existing accounts. This elevated rate showcases LiaFi's commitment to assisting small businesses, organizations, and non-profits in optimizing their cash reserves by offering a straightforward method to earn competitive interest on dormant funds while maintaining liquidity. This change reflects LiaFi's dedication to supporting small businesses.

data.title: James Hardie Industries to optimize manufacturing by adjusting facilities in California and South Carolina.
data.description: Leading provider of exterior home solutions, James Hardie Industries plc (NYSE / ASX: JHX), has revealed plans to enhance its manufacturing operations in line with the Hardie™ Operating System (“HOS”). The company will optimize its manufacturing footprint by making changes to facilities in Fontana, California and Summerville, South Carolina. These strategic efforts highlight James Hardie’s dedication to operational excellence.

data.title: AFL unveils improved OTDR solutions for networks, featuring FS300-HDR Product Series to enhance performance and value.
data.description: A company based in Spartanburg, South Carolina, known as AFL, which is a top manufacturer of fiber optic cables and related services, has recently unveiled an array of new products and notable enhancements to its OTDR product range. These improvements are designed to markedly boost the performance and value of the OTDR products. AFL, recognized for having the most compact, fastest, and user-friendly OTDRs, is launching the FS300-HDR Product Series. This FlexScan® FS300-HDR series aims to elevate OTDR testing to a whole new level.

data.title: Ralph Lauren appoints Cesar Conde, NBCUniversal News Group Chairman, to its Board of Directors.
data.description: In New York, Ralph Lauren Corporation revealed the addition of Cesar Conde, current Chairman of NBCUniversal News Group, to its Board of Directors. This announcement marks a significant development in the company, as Conde brings valuable expertise to the Board. Known for his leadership in the media industry, Conde's appointment underscores Ralph Lauren Corporation's commitment to enhancing its strategic direction. With this new addition, the Board is poised to benefit from Conde's insights and guidance.

data.title: Kathryn McLay to leave Walmart after 10 years. Will step down as President and CEO of Walmart International on Jan 31.
data.description: Retail giant Walmart Inc. (Nasdaq: WMT) revealed today that Kathryn McLay, currently serving as the President and CEO of Walmart International, will be leaving the company. McLay will stay in her position until January 31st, with plans to assist in a seamless shift during the first quarter. Walmart Inc.'s President and CEO Doug McMillon expressed appreciation for McLay's contributions over the course of her ten-year tenure, acknowledging her positive influence on both employees and the organization.

data.title: Patriot Hyundai of Bradley is building a 17,000-square-foot dealership to enhance service for Bradley and Bourbonnais.
data.description: BRADLEY, Illinois – Patriot Hyundai of Bradley in BourbonnaisIL has revealed intentions to construct a new dealership spanning roughly 17,000 square feet. This initiative signifies a substantial commitment to enhancing Hyundai sales and service in the region. The upcoming facility will feature an expanded service department equipped with two extra service lifts, enabling the dealership to accommodate a higher volume of vehicles.

data.title: PolyML receives $1.5M investment from Martinrea International, expanding opportunities in advanced machine learning.
data.description: A technology company based in Waterloo, Ontario, PolyML, has disclosed a strategic investment from Martinrea International Inc. (TSX:MRE), a prominent automotive supplier with a global presence. The investment, totaling $1.5 million, grants Martinrea International a minority stake in PolyML. This move signifies Martinrea's recognition of PolyML's advanced machine learning and data analytics technology, especially in demanding industrial settings. The partnership is subject to specific conditions for full implementation.

data.title: Orion S.A. (NYSE: OEC) set to release Q4 2025 results on Feb 17. Conference call at 8:30am ET. Dial-in numbers provided. Replay available until March 3.
data.description: Houston-based Orion S.A. (NYSE: OEC), a specialty chemical company, has announced it will report its Q4 2025 results on Tuesday, Feb. 17, 2026, before the market opens. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 8:30 a.m. (ET). For the live call, dial U.S. Toll Free: 1-877-407-4018 or International: 1-201-689-8471. A replay will be available until March 3, 2026.

data.title: Global electric boat market to reach $20.1 billion by 2035 with CAGR of 11.59%; currently valued at $6.01 billion.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "Electric Boat Market, Till 2035" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global electric boat market is expected to grow from USD 6.01 billion this year to approximately USD 20.1 billion by 2035, showing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 11.59%. The report covers the distribution of boat types, battery types, power sources, sizes, applications, and geographical regions in the market. Traditional vessels are also discussed in the analysis.

data.title: KBRA assigns preliminary ratings to Lendbuzz Securitization Trust 2026-1 auto loan ABS transaction, with credit enhancement ranging from 36.05% to 11.50%.
data.description: New York-based KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to five classes of notes issued by Lendbuzz Securitization Trust 2026-1, an auto loan ABS transaction. The ratings range from 36.05% for the Class A notes to 11.50% for the Class D notes, reflecting initial credit enhancement levels. This credit enhancement includes overcollateralization, subordination of junior note classes (excluding Class D notes), and a funded cash reserve account.

data.title: Headwater Exploration Inc. reports 24,250 boe/d production in Q4, $326M funds flow, and 2025 reserves: 44.5 mmboe proved developed producing, 68.3 mmboe total proved, 104.5 mmboe total proved plus probable. Nearly $228M capex spent in 2025 for 12% production growth. Operations update includes successful results in Grand Rapids and Greater Pelican Area. Expect 60% oil production supported by secondary recovery by end of 2026. Reserves data assessed by McDaniel & Associates Consultants Ltd. shows total proved plus probable reserves at 104,505 MBOE. Targeting less than 20% decline rate and less than 30% maintenance capital at $60 WTI. (Total characters: 535)
data.description: Headwater Exploration Inc. reported fourth-quarter average production volumes of about 24,250 barrels of oil equivalent per day (boe/d) and 2025 reserves information, with reserves increasing significantly. Their 2025 annual production volumes were around 22,750 boe/d, showing a 12% year-over-year production per share growth. Adjusted funds flow from operations were roughly $326 million, with an estimated adjusted funds flow netback of approximately $39.25 per boe. The company executed a capital expenditure program totaling approximately $228 million in 2025. Successes were seen in the Grand Rapids Formation and Greater Pelican Area, with positive production results. They also demonstrated a commitment to secondary recovery, aiming for sustainable production and reduced decline rates. By year-end 2026, they estimate that 60% of their oil production will be supported by secondary recovery. In terms of reserves, Headwater has reserves in Alberta and New Brunswick, with reports indicating significant increases in various categories. They aim to maintain production levels and dividends at different oil price points, showing strong financial and operational performance. Overall, Headwater Exploration Inc. showcased strong production growth, solid financial performance, and positive reserve additions in the mentioned period. They are focused on sustainability, operational efficiency, and maximizing their asset base for future growth.
